entity.summary: Solana proprietary-market-maker decentralized exchange with substantial current spot-swap volume and protocol-level exchange activity.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies BisonFi as a Solana Prop AMM and reports substantial current 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. HEI uses active status from current exchange-volume evidence but leaves URL fields unset because a stable first-party website surface was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: BisonFi volume metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies BisonFi as a Solana proprietary-market-maker DEX and reports substantial non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume plus cumulative volume.

evidence.title: BisonFi protocol API record
evidence.notes: Protocol-detail API provides an independent structured registry surface for the BisonFi identity and Solana protocol context.

evidence.title: BisonFi DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently preserves BisonFi in the current DEX-volume registry and corroborates active exchange activity.
